subcodes.first_line: O descendant of that illustrious personage! Thy noble father sacrificed his life in the path of the Lord [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای سلیل آن شخص جلیل پدر بزرگوار در ره پروردگار مدت حیات جانفشانی نمود و گوی
subcodes.subjects: @eulogies; reminiscences, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @call to action, @rejection, opposition and persecution
